title: Merge Conflict Resolution in tickets/index.ts
description: Resolved merge conflict between HLX-342 ticket-ref improvements and staging's --mode flag addition in the tickets usage string.

steps.title: ticketsUsage function - conflict location
steps.description: The conflict was in this function. The ticket branch changed the exitCode parameter and output routing, while staging kept the simpler version. Resolution: kept ticket branch's dynamic exitCode.

steps.title: Merged get command usage
steps.description: Kept ticket branch's <ticket-ref> nomenclature and [--json] flag from HLX-342.

steps.title: Merged create command usage
steps.description: Added staging's [--mode <AUTO|BUILD|FIX|RESEARCH|EXECUTE>] flag to the create command line, combined with ticket branch's formatting.

steps.title: Ticket-ref explanation footer
steps.description: Kept the ticket branch's explanation footer that documents what ticket references accept (internal ID, short ID, ticket number).
